import { Tabs, TabItem } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

<Tabs>
<TabItem label="HTML" icon="seti:html">
:::note
This rule has been implemented but not released yet. It will be available in the next release.
:::
:::caution
This rule is part of the [nursery](/linter/#nursery) group. This means that it is experimental and the behavior can change at any time.
:::
## Summary
- Diagnostic Category: [`lint/nursery/noVueVOnNumberValues`](/reference/diagnostics#diagnostic-category)
- This rule doesn't have a fix.
- The default severity of this rule is [**information**](/reference/diagnostics#information).
- This rule belongs to the following domains:
  - [`vue`](/linter/domains#vue)
- Sources: 
  - Same as [`vue/no-deprecated-v-on-number-modifiers`](https://eslint.vuejs.org/rules/no-deprecated-v-on-number-modifiers)

## How to configure
```json title="biome.json"
{
	"linter": {
		"rules": {
			"nursery": {
				"noVueVOnNumberValues": "error"
			}
		}
	}
}

```
## Description
Disallow deprecated number modifiers on Vue `v-on` directives.

Vue 3 no longer supports using key code numbers as event modifiers.

## Examples

### Invalid

```vue
<input v-on:keyup.13="submit" />
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text"></code></pre>

```vue
<input @keyup.13="submit" />
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text"></code></pre>

### Valid

```vue
<input v-on:keyup.enter="submit" />
```

```vue
<input @keyup.enter="submit" />
```
